conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the strongest connection with H, as we quickly bonded over our shared drive to support our families and promised to keep each other in the loop. J and E also resonated with me deeply because we established a mutual understanding that our primary goal is to win for the people counting on us back home. In contrast, I felt the least connected to I, as our conversation remained fairly surface-level and lacked the same sense of partnership I found with the others.

I made informal agreements with H, J, and E to look out for one another and cooperate to ensure we all walk away with something for our families. I genuinely trust H and J given our alignment on priorities, but I am more skeptical of I since our interaction was the least substantial.
